FlipRun.Log.RunWin: All big-round targets cleared. Run won.

FlipRun.Log.ChainBadge: Chain Badge: combo multiplier increased to x{0}.
FlipRun.CardDesc.Carrot: Carrot: +1 coin, +3 score; +8 extra score if Rabbit appears this turn.
FlipRun.CardDesc.Ticket: Ticket: +1 coin, +8 score; +6 extra score if Gold Block flipped this turn.
FlipRun.CardDesc.GoldBlock: High-value economy card: +8 coins, +2 score; combo adds extra coins.
FlipRun.CardDesc.Clover: Clover: +1 score and grants +1 extra flip next turn (+2 when comboed).
FlipRun.Log.GainTurn: Turn resolved: +{0} coins, +{1} score. Now coins {2}, score {3}.
FlipRun.CardDesc.PiggyBank: Piggy Bank: base +2 score; turn end grants bonus coins by 20% of turn coins.
FlipRun.CardDesc.ChainBadge: Chain Badge: +3 score and increases same-card combo reward multiplier.
FlipRun.CardDesc.Mirror: Mirror: copies 60% of previous card gain for both coins and score.
FlipRun.Log.Mirror: Mirror triggered: copied gains, +{0} coins and +{1} score.
